title: 10 Pack Pink Star Balloons - 18 Inch Star Shaped Foil Balloons for Christmas Birthdays Father's Day Engagement Wedding Baby Shower Party Decorations
features: Premium Quality: Our Star Balloons are made from non-toxic, high-quality foil, ensuring safety and durability for long-lasting enjoyment.

Easy to Inflate and Seal: With our foil balloons for helium, inflating and sealing is a breeze. Simply fill them with air or helium, and once the inflation nozzle is pressed, the balloons stay inflated and won't leak.

Versatile Decoration: Perfect for various occasions such as Christmas, Halloween, parties, baby showers, Mother's Day, Father's Day, Valentine's Day, proposals, weddings, and more. These foil star balloons can be combined with other party decorations to create a memorable and delightful atmosphere.
Complete Package: Each set includes 10 Gold star-shaped foil balloons, a white straw for inflation, and a white ribbon, giving you everything you need to create a festive display.

Safety Precautions: Please keep the balloons away from heat sources and sharp objects to avoid damage or unnecessary harm. Celebrate with peace of mind knowing that our star foil balloons are designed to provide a safe and enjoyable experience.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page PACKAGE INCLUDED: ✔Star foil balloons × 10 ✔White straw × 1 ✔White ribbon × 1 ✔ Material: High quality of foil helium ✔ Size: 18inch ✔Occasion: Wedding, Baby Shower, Anniversary, Birthday, Valentine's Day, Christmas, Halloween, Thanksgiving etc. ✔Colour: 10pcs Silver/10pcs Gold/10pcs Red/10pcs Deep Blue/10pcs Black/10pcs Pink/10pcs Rainbow/3pcs White,3pcs Blue,4pcs Pink/10pcs Mix Color
